SF sign cheat-sheet (read me first)
One JSON object per parking sign on the pole. Ignore non-parking signs (stop, speed, street name, one-way).
time_limitGreen "2 HOUR PARKING 9AM-6PM MON-SAT". Set limit=120, days, start/end.
permit_limitSame green sign but "EXCEPT VEHICLES WITH AREA C PERMIT". Set permit area + limit.
street_cleaningRed "NO PARKING ... STREET CLEANING", a short weekly window (e.g. Tue 8-10am).
no_parkingRed "NO PARKING [window]" with no cleaning/permit text.
no_stopping"NO STOPPING [window]". Often red-hatched + "TOW AWAY" -> set tow=YES.
tow_away"TOW AWAY NO STOPPING ANY TIME" style. Use Any-time, tow=YES.
loading_only"PASSENGER / COMMERCIAL LOADING ONLY [window]".

Rules: "MON THRU FRI"=M-F. "ANY TIME"/"AT ALL TIMES" = All-7 + 00:00-23:59 (use the Any-time button). Times in 24h. Set confidence=low if you are guessing any field. Empty pole or no parking sign visible → press E (exports []). Truly illegible (graffiti/blur) → press I (skipped, not trained on).

Keys: P prefill from Opus · A add sign · 1-7 set type of last sign · E empty · I illegible · Enter save+next · ←/→ navigate.

Label this pole

Add one sign per parking plate, or mark the pole empty/illegible. Your labels feed the next training run.
